licenseHotfixesLive: The public account payload keeps raw license keys redacted.
Authenticated POST reveal/repair is CSRF-protected and no-store.
Paid active records with missing or malformed key material can be repaired on the same entitlement record.
The client has Clipboard API and textarea fallback and does not report a copy success for an empty key.
The paginated paid-license scan no longer has a fixed 2,000-record cap.

tests.syntax: src/server.js, src/discordBot.js and src/paradise3a59.js passed node --check

blockedItems: Current authenticated production DB scan requires the owner session; the Chrome extension connection was unavailable after the deployment.
Current post-deployment browser click/reveal verification is blocked by the same Chrome connection issue.
